expectations.text: Review identifies SQL injection in at least 3 endpoints
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 (P0) identifies SQL injection at 6 locations: lines 25, 36, 55, 61, 91, 104 - consolidated into a single finding.

expectations.text: Review flags the hardcoded API key (ADMIN_API_KEY) as P0 or P1
expectations.evidence: Finding #2 (P0): 'Hardcoded admin API key in source code' with the key value quoted.

expectations.text: Review identifies missing authentication on CRUD endpoints
expectations.evidence: Finding #4 (P1): 'No authentication or authorization on any CRUD endpoint' listing all 4 affected endpoints.

expectations.text: Review flags plaintext password storage and logging
expectations.evidence: Finding #3 (P0): 'Plaintext password storage and multi-channel leakage' covering database, email, logs, and export.

expectations.text: Review identifies path traversal vulnerability in export_user_data
expectations.evidence: Finding #6 (P1): 'Path traversal via user-controlled filename' with os.path.basename() fix.

expectations.text: Review flags the swallowed exception in the email sending block
expectations.evidence: Finding #11 (P2): 'Swallowed exception on email failure' identifying the except Exception: pass pattern.

expectations.text: Review uses the P0-P3 severity format from the skill
expectations.evidence: Uses P0 Critical (3), P1 High (4), P2 Medium (6), P3 Low (2) with exact format headers.

expectations.text: Review includes a Next Steps section with options
expectations.evidence: Full Next Steps section with 4 options and issue count summary.

expectations.text: Review identifies the password being sent in the welcome email
expectations.evidence: Finding #3 (P0) bullet point: 'Passwords are sent in cleartext in the welcome email body (line 72)' - consolidated with other password issues.

expectations.text: Review includes a Top Issues TL;DR section listing 3-5 top issues
expectations.evidence: Top Issues section lists 5 items: SQL injection, hardcoded key, plaintext passwords, no auth, path traversal.

expectations.text: Review has 3 or fewer P0 findings
expectations.evidence: Exactly 3 P0 findings: SQL injection, hardcoded key, plaintext passwords.

expectations.text: Review has 15 or fewer total individually listed findings
Review consolidates related SQL injection findings into a single entry
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 lists all 6 SQL injection locations (lines 25,36,55,61,91,104) as a single P0 finding instead of 6 separate entries.
